*STAFFREX INFO SOLUTIONS | Contract Hiring – Remote (India)*

STAFFREX INFO SOLUTIONS (OPC) PRIVATE LIMITED is hiring experienced Full Stack and AI engineers for long-term contract roles with enterprise clients.
All roles are remote (India) and have a 6–12-month duration.

*1) Full Stack Developer – Agentic AI (6+ Years)*

Focus: AI-first product development

Work includes building Agentic AI systems, LLM-based applications, and scalable full-stack platforms.

*Core areas:*

•	Agentic AI and GenAI applications 
•	LLM frameworks (LangChain, LangGraph, AutoGen, CrewAI) 
•	RAG systems and embeddings 
•	React + TypeScript frontend 
•	.NET / Node.js / Python backend 
•	Azure cloud, microservices, CI/CD 
•	API design and system architecture 

You will work on end-to-end AI solutions from design to production.

*2) Senior Full Stack Developer (.NET + React + Azure + AI)*

Focus: Enterprise product delivery and technical leadership

*Responsibilities:*

•	Lead development teams and sprint delivery 
•	Design enterprise architecture and microservices 
•	Build React frontend and .NET backend services 
•	Deploy and manage Azure cloud applications 
•	Code reviews, performance tuning, production support 

*Key stack:*

•	React, TypeScript, Redux 
•	.NET Core / .NET 8, C# 
•	Azure (App Services, Functions, Service Bus, AKS) 
•	Docker, CI/CD pipelines 
•	OpenAI, Copilot, LangGraph, Agentic AI tools 

*3) Full Stack Developer (.NET + React + Azure)*

Focus: Full lifecycle application development

*Responsibilities:*

•	Frontend development using React 
•	Backend APIs using .NET Core 
•	Microservices design 
•	Azure deployment and DevOps pipelines 
•	Database design and optimization 
•	Production support and code quality 

*Common Requirements*

•	6+ years full-stack development experience 
•	Strong Microsoft technology stack experience 
•	Enterprise application exposure 
•	Good system design understanding 
•	Strong communication and ownership mindset 

*Why Apply Through StaffRex*

•	Direct client opportunities 
•	Long-term contracts 
•	Remote work (India) 
•	Faster interview process 
•	Competitive compensation 

*Apply*

*Email:* info@staffrex.in
*Website:* www.staffrex.in
*Subject: Full Stack Developer – Agentic AI*

Hiring for contractual position of Senior AI Engineer (LLM / RAG / Agents) 3-5 Years 
Location Remote 
Pls share 9667627371
Follow for more position Nidhi Rajput

Senior AI Engineer (LLM / RAG / Agents)
📍 Remote | Contract
🕒 4 Hours EST Overlap
👨‍💻 Experience: 2–4 Years
Job Summary:
We are looking for a hands-on AI Engineer to build scalable, production-ready AI systems using LLMs, RAG pipelines, and agent-based architectures. The role involves designing intelligent workflows, optimizing performance, and ensuring reliability, observability, and cost efficiency.
Key Responsibilities:
Build and optimize LLM-based agents (planner, router, intent systems)
Develop RAG pipelines with embeddings, retrieval & reranking
Tune prompts, routing logic, and model performance
Implement evaluation metrics (accuracy, latency, quality)
Ensure observability (logs, traces, cost tracking)
Maintain secure, scalable APIs and CI/CD pipelines
Required Skills:
Strong experience with LLMs, RAG, and AI systems
Knowledge of vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, etc.)
Proficiency in Python or Node.js
Experience with APIs, system design, and backend development
Understanding of observability, security, and performance optimization
Good to Have:
Knowledge graphs, OpenTelemetry, Kubernetes
A/B testing, evaluation frameworks, and cost optimization
If you want, I can make an even shorter 2–3 line WhatsApp/LinkedIn version for quick hiring posts.

🚀 We’re Hiring: Senior Data Scientist – Real-World Data (RWD)

Exciting opportunity for experienced Data Scientists to work on impactful healthcare analytics and AI-driven insights!

📍 Location: Remote / Hybrid
📄 Contract Duration: Minimum 6 Months
👨‍💻 Experience Required: 6–9 Years
⚡ Joining: Immediate | Contractors

💡 Role Overview:
You will lead advanced analytics initiatives using real-world healthcare data (RWD) such as claims, EHR/EMR, registries, and longitudinal datasets. The role focuses on generating insights across R&D, medical, and commercial functions.

🔑 Must-Have Skills:
✔ Strong experience in RWD / RWE analytics
✔ Hands-on with Healthcare datasets (Claims, EHR/EMR, Registries)
✔ Expertise in Machine Learning & Predictive Modeling
✔ Strong Statistical Modeling background
✔ Proficiency in Python / R / SQL
✔ Experience in Pharma / Healthcare Analytics

✨ Nice-to-Have Skills:
• Causal Inference
• Survival Analysis
• NLP
• Cloud-based ML platforms
• HEOR / Observational Study exposure

🔧 Additional Skills:
• Advanced Analytics & BI
• Data Visualization
• Data Governance
• Strong communication & storytelling
• Stakeholder management & mentoring

📩 To Apply, Please Share:
• Updated Resume
• Total Experience & Relevant RWD/RWE Experience
• Current Location
• Minimum 3–6 Months Availability

📧 Send your profiles to:
himanshu.tamang@bytebillion.com
